text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe I lost! O Shiraoki, why<n>didst thou
desert me?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
What if Shiraoki was asleep or<n>something? I can't
have a god that's<n>napping on the job!
choice_data_list: Let's do our best next time.
Maybe your skills are being put to the test.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nngh, okay... It just wasn't my lucky<n>day, I guess.
What can you do?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Sigh... I just hope Shiraoki will beawake next time around.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Say what?! Are you suggesting that<n>the great
Shiraoki wished to see how<n>I perform without
good fortune on my<n>side?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Nooo! Doesn't this mean I've<n>completely messed
up?! Shiraoki<n>must be so disappointed!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I need to get back on track! I'm<n>definitely taking
first next race... Or, at<n>least second!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With Matikanefukukitaru's feet to the<n>fire, we
make a vow to come out<n>victorious next time.
